CustomObject.description: Declarative metadata about each concrete LoggerNotifiable implementation. Read by the guided setup LWCs to render notifier-specific UX: which service fields to show (webhook vs named credential), which recipient fields the notifier honors (channel identifier / recipient address / recipient user), setup guidance content, and a suggested starting-point JSON for ConfigurationJson__c. Not read by the runtime - the runtime still looks up notifier classes via LoggerNotificationService__c.NotifierApexClassName__c.
CustomObject.label: Logger Notifier Type
